name: Recount Ridge
text:
Recount Ridge enters the battlefield tapped, because there was a recount.
When Recount Ridge enters the battlefield, flip a coin. If you win the flip, demand another recount and flip again. (Yes, you may keep going. No, the other players will not be happy.)
{T}: Add {R}.
flavorText: Officials have certified the results four times. The results keep un-certifying themselves.
